_doc: The baseline airwatch version the cleanroom test installs FIRST, before upgrading to HEAD. Default is v1.0.0 — the first release (config-entry VERSION=1, single-step config-flow, pollutant field 'selected_pollutants'). The no-loss gate only holds WITHIN the same schema generation, so the baseline must stay on the latest release of the current generation. Override with --baseline <tag> for smoke runs or future baselines.

v1.0.0.notes: First release. config-entry VERSION=1, single-step config-flow (ha_flow.py drives single-step for flow_version <= 1), unified pollutant key 'selected_pollutants'. NOTE: 'flow_version' here is the config-FLOW SHAPE the cleanroom harness drives (single-step for v1, two-step reserved for any future VERSION that splits the flow) — NOT the config-entry storage VERSION. First release of the current schema generation — the correct cleanroom baseline going forward.

_when_to_update: Add a new entry under 'versions' when a new release is tagged AND its flow VERSION or pollutant field changed. Bootstrap errors loudly on unknown baseline tag. Keep 'default_baseline' on the latest release of the CURRENT schema generation; only bump it across another deliberate breaking schema change.
